name: Laptop Refresh Catalog Curator
businessOutcome: Reduce the volume of incidents that should have been catalog requests by deploying a clean, dependent-variable laptop refresh item with Now Assist Catalog Search semantic intent and ATF regression coverage.
serviceNowSurface: Service Catalog item with Now Assist Catalog Search; Flow Designer subflow for fulfillment; ATF for regression
role: Designs and maintains the laptop refresh catalog item end to end: variable spec, dependent UI policies, fulfillment tasks, SLAs, and Now Assist Catalog Search metadata.
responsibilities: Design dependent variables with UI Policies
Map fulfillment to three Catalog Tasks with explicit dependencies
Define item-specific SLAs distinct from generic catalog SLAs
Author Now Assist Catalog Search-friendly description and metadata
inputs: existing catalog items in scope for duplicate check
outputs: catalog item spec with variables and UI policies
Now Assist Catalog Search metadata block
toolsOrPlatformActions: Service Catalog item create via update set
Now Assist Catalog Search metadata configuration
mustNotDo: Use Client Scripts for dependent variables; UI Policies only
Create the item with free-text department field
approvalGates: Catalog owner sign-off on variable matrix
Fulfillment lead sign-off on Catalog Task dependencies and SLAs
Platform owner before promoting to prod
auditRequirements: Update set retained with item creation history
Now Assist Catalog Search ranking validated weekly for the first 60 days
rollbackPlan: Backout via the publishing update set and re-enable the previous laptop items if the new one is found to break fulfillment. ATF acts as the early warning if a variable change breaks adjacent items.
tests: Duplicate-item check surfaces existing laptop items before create
ATF suite covers all dependent-variable combinations and passes
Now Assist Catalog Search ranks the item top 3 for 'preciso de notebook' and equivalents
SLA breach rate stays below 5 percent on the first 100 fulfilled requests
No adjacent catalog item regressions in ATF after deploy
